## Goal

Ensure `docs/03_setup.md` is complete, accurate, and tested end-to-end.

## Scope

### 1. Prerequisites Section

- Python version requirements
- Database requirements
- API key requirements

### 2. Installation Steps

- Virtual environment setup
- Dependency installation
- Database initialization
- Model training

### 3. Configuration

- Environment variables
- Config file options
- Troubleshooting common issues

### 4. Verification

- Health check commands
- Test classification command
- Expected outputs

## Checklist

- [ ] All commands tested on fresh environment
- [ ] PowerShell syntax (Windows-first)
- [ ] Error messages documented
- [ ] Screenshots if needed
- [ ] Troubleshooting section

## Documentation Standards

- Use ````powershell` code blocks
- Include expected output
- Link to related docs
- Single source of truth marker

## Acceptance Criteria

- New user can follow guide start-to-finish
- No missing steps
- Troubleshooting covers common issues
- Tested on Windows 11

## Files Modified

- `docs/03_setup.md`

## Success Criteria

- Guide tested by someone unfamiliar with project
- All commands work as documented
- Clear and concise writing
